title: CBDT Notifies Income Tax (Second Amendment) Rules 2026: Key Update on 'Specified Fund' Definition
content:
# CBDT Notifies Income Tax (Second Amendment) Rules 2026: Key Update on 'Specified Fund' Definition

Ek important update hai! Government ne Income Tax (Second Amendment) Rules, 2026 announce kiya hai, jisse 'specified fund' ki definition mein changes aaye hain.

The Central Board of Direct Taxes (CBDT) ne Notification No. 94 of 2026 dated July 21, 2026, through G.S.R. 646(E) mein Income Tax (Second Amendment) Rules, 2026 notify kiya hai. Yeh rules immediately effect mein aa gaye hain, from the date of their publication in the Official Gazette, i.e., July 21, 2026.

**Key Changes:**

*   **Amendment to Rule 157(5)(c):** The notification primarily amends clause (c) of sub-rule (5) of Rule 157 of the Income-tax Rules, 2026.
*   **Redefinition of "Specified Fund":** The term "specified fund" has been redefined to include:
    *   Any fund established or incorporated in India as a trust, company, limited liability partnership (LLP), or body corporate.
    *   It must have a certificate of registration as a Category I or Category II Alternative Investment Fund (AIF).
    *   The fund should be regulated under the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Alternative Investment Funds) Regulations, 2012, OR
    *   If located in an International Financial Services Centre (IFSC), it should be regulated under the International Financial Services Centres Authority (Fund Management) Regulations, 2022.
    *   Additionally, it now also includes any fund referred to in Schedule VI [Note 1(g)] to the Income-tax Act, 2025.

**Why this amendment?**
Yeh amendment Income-tax Rules ko Income-tax Act, 2025 ke provisions ke saath align karta hai, especially regarding investment funds operating in International Financial Services Centres (IFSCs) like GIFT City. Isse tax framework mein clarity aur consistency aayegi.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Visit the Income Tax Department's Official Website for Notifications](https://www.incometaxindia.gov.in/)

*Published on: 23 July 2026*
